env.name: HF_TOKEN
env.purpose: checkpoint pull at volume-priming time only; not needed at serve time when the volume is pre-primed

warm_up.warm_signal: model weights fully loaded and engine initialization complete (first successful /v1/models response after load); readiness is false for the entire load window so no traffic reaches a cold replica (fault scenario fs-11)

model_mount.expected_content: meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct @ revision 0e9e39f249a16976918f6564b8830bc894c89659 (matches model-profile model-llama31-8b; comparability pin)

pre_stop.action: engine stops accepting new requests (gateway routing already shifted by readiness=false); in-flight generations run to completion

secrets.name: hf-model-pull-token
secrets.purpose: authenticated checkpoint download when priming the model volume

notes: Example fixture; digest illustrative, engine version matches the capability descriptor examples (as of 2026-07 — re-verify at use time). startup probe budget: 10s x 30 = 300s > expected_warm_up_seconds=180, so liveness never kills a loading replica (no restart loops, fs-11).
